hero.name: Sriganesh K C
hero.description: Bridging the gap between hardware and software to design innovative, impactful technologies.

paragraphs: Highly motivated Electrical and Electronics Engineering undergraduate with a strong foundation in hardware design, embedded systems, and software development.
Proficient in C/C++ and Verilog HDL, showcasing project expertise that ranges from engineering advanced IoT power monitoring devices to building intelligent AI-driven software.
Passionate about creating elegant solutions that combine low-level hardware control with high-level software intelligence.

experience.title: Internship - Renault Nissan Automotive
experience.description: Completed an immersive industrial internship gaining hands-on exposure to advanced manufacturing machinery, automated assembly lines, and industrial operations. Strictly adhered to multinational safety protocols and standards while analyzing supply chain logistics and operational efficiency.

experience.title: Internship - Fuji Electric India
experience.description: Acquired practical, in-depth knowledge of industrial power electronics, focusing on the diagnosis, operation, and load-testing of industrial-grade inverters and stabilizers. Configured systems based on specific client technical requirements and utilized SAP software modules to track technical processes processes, support industrial workflows, and manage inventory.

projects.title: AI Email Assistant & Webpage Summarizer
projects.description: Developed an intelligent AI-powered browser extension that integrates seamlessly with Gmail and webpages to perform text summarization and smart categorization. Leverages natural language processing (NLP) models on a fast Vercel backend.

projects.title: 3-Phase Power Monitoring System
projects.description: Engineered an advanced 3-phase power monitoring hardware device utilizing an ESP32/NodeMCU and arrays of precision sensors to track the R, Y, and B phases simultaneously. Transmits high-frequency telemetry data over Wi-Fi to a custom Python backend.

projects.title: Biogas Plant Commercialisation
projects.description: Designed strategic protocols and an operational framework to commercialize an existing biogas plant. Focused on maximizing yield, optimizing raw materials input, and establishing a sustainable loop to promote effective organic waste reduction at scale.

projects.title: Arduino Voltage & Current Measurer
projects.description: Built a compact, embedded hardware solution to accurately track the electrical current and voltage transferred through various appliances in real-time, utilizing Arduino microcontrollers and integrated circuitry components.

education.title: B.E. in Electrical & Electronics Engineering
education.school: Prince Shri Venkateswara Padmavathy Engineering College

education.title: Primary & Higher Secondary Education
